_doc: Bug-hunt findings log. Real audit findings, severity-rated. Our own code first (warm-up + protects the wallet); external in-scope targets next (need the operator's platform account to submit). Honest: most passes find nothing — logged findings are the exceptions.

findings.title: max_total_deployed_usd not enforced cumulatively
findings.description: The deploy amount was capped per-action via Math.min(amount, max_per_action, max_total). max_total was therefore applied to EACH action independently, not to the AGGREGATE — repeated executions could each deploy up to max_total, exceeding the intended total.
findings.impact: If the bounded-yield module were armed + funded, it could over-deploy beyond the operator's intended total cap (bounded to funded balance). Not live (module shelved/disarmed, $0 capital) — but a real flaw before arming.
findings.fix: Sum prior mode:'executed' amounts from data/agent-trader.jsonl = deployedSoFar; cap new amount to remaining = max_total - deployedSoFar; refuse at the cumulative cap.
findings.bounty: n/a (our code) — demonstrates the audit capability is real
